summary.text: Represents the GPU vendors supported by the application.
Provides extension methods for adding Ollama resources to the application model.

members.name: AddHuggingFaceModel
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<OllamaModelResource> OllamaResourceBuilderExtensions.AddHuggingFaceModel(this IResourceBuilder<IOllamaResource> builder, string name, string modelName)

summary.text: Adds a model from Hugging Face to the Ollama resource. Only models in GGUF format are supported.

modelName.text: The name of the LLM from Hugging Face in GGUF format to download on initial startup.

members.name: AddModel
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<OllamaModelResource> OllamaResourceBuilderExtensions.AddModel(this IResourceBuilder<IOllamaResource> builder, string modelName)

summary.text: Adds a model to the Ollama resource.

modelName.text: The name of the LLM to download on initial startup.

members.name: AddModel
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<OllamaModelResource> OllamaResourceBuilderExtensions.AddModel(this IResourceBuilder<IOllamaResource> builder, string name, string modelName)

summary.text: Adds a model to the Ollama resource.

modelName.text: The name of the LLM to download on initial startup.

members.name: AddOllama
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<OllamaResource> OllamaResourceBuilderExtensions.AddOllama(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder builder, string name, int? port = null)

summary.text: Adds an Ollama container resource to the application model.

name.text: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

port.text: An optional fixed port to bind to the Ollama container. This will be provided randomly by Aspire if not set.

members.name: AddOllamaLocal
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<OllamaExecutableResource> OllamaResourceBuilderExtensions.AddOllamaLocal(this IDistributedApplicationBuilder builder, string name, int? port = null, int? targetPort = null)

summary.text: Adds an Ollama executable resource to the application model.

name.text: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

port.text: An optional fixed port to bind to the Ollama process. This will be provided randomly by Aspire if not set.

targetPort.text: An optional fixed port to run the Ollama process. This will default to 11434 if not set.

members.name: WithDataVolume
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<OllamaResource> OllamaResourceBuilderExtensions.WithDataVolume(this IResourceBuilder<OllamaResource> builder, string? name = null, bool isReadOnly = false)

summary.text: Adds a data volume to the Ollama container.

isReadOnly.text: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only volume.

name.text: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

members.name: WithDataVolume
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<OpenWebUIResource> OllamaResourceBuilderExtensions.WithDataVolume(this IResourceBuilder<OpenWebUIResource> builder, string? name = null, bool isReadOnly = false)

summary.text: Adds a data volume to the Open WebUI container.

isReadOnly.text: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only volume.

name.text: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

members.name: WithGPUSupport
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<OllamaResource> OllamaResourceBuilderExtensions.WithGPUSupport(this IResourceBuilder<OllamaResource> builder, OllamaGpuVendor vendor = OllamaGpuVendor.Nvidia)

summary.text: Adds GPU support to the Ollama container.

remarks.text: This will add the right arguments to the container to enable GPU support as per

vendor.text: The GPU vendor, defaults to Nvidia.

description.text: Thrown when the builder is null.

members.name: WithHostPort
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<OpenWebUIResource> OllamaResourceBuilderExtensions.WithHostPort(this IResourceBuilder<OpenWebUIResource> builder, int? port)

summary.text: Configures the host port that the Open WebUI resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

returns.text: The resource builder for Open WebUI.

builder.text: The resource builder for Open WebUI.

port.text: The port to bind on the host. If
is used random port will be assigned.

members.name: WithOpenWebUI
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<T> OllamaResourceBuilderExtensions.WithOpenWebUI<T>(this IResourceBuilder<T> builder, Action<IResourceBuilder<OpenWebUIResource>>? configureContainer = null, string? containerName = null)

summary.text: Adds an Open WebUI container to the application model for administering Ollama. This version of the package defaults to the main tag of the Open WebUI container image.

remarks.text: See https://openwebui.com for more information about Open WebUI

configureContainer.text: Configuration callback for Open WebUI container resource.

description.text: Use in application host with an Ollama resource
